heading: Relending program to resolve ownership and succession on farmland
label: 1936c Relending program to resolve ownership and succession on farmland

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary may make loans to eligible entities described in subsection (b) so that the eligible entities may relend the funds to individuals and entities for the purposes described in subsection (c).
certification under section 1805.201 of title 12, Code of Federal Regulations (or successor regulations), to operate as a lender;

experience assisting socially disadvantaged farmers and ranchers (as defined in subsection (a) of ) or limited resource or new and beginning farmers and ranchers, rural businesses, cooperatives, or credit unions, including experience in making and servicing agricultural and commercial loans; andsection 2279 of this title
the ability to provide adequate assurance of the repayment of a loan.

children.heading: Eligible purposes
children.label: c Eligible purposes
children.text: The proceeds from loans made by the Secretary pursuant to subsection (a) shall be re-lent by eligible entities for projects that assist heirs with undivided ownership interests to resolve ownership and succession on farmland that has multiple owners.
with not less than 10 years of experience serving socially disadvantaged farmers and ranchers; and

in States that have adopted a statute consisting of an enactment or adoption of the Uniform Partition of Heirs Property Act, as approved and recommended for enactment in all States by the National Conference of Commissioners on Uniform State Laws in 2010, that relend to owners of heirs property (as defined in that Act).
The interest rate at which intermediaries may borrow funds under this section shall be determined by the Secretary.

children.label: A
children.text: determined by the intermediary in an amount sufficient to cover the cost of operating and sustaining the revolving loan fund; and

children.label: B
children.text: clearly and publicly disclosed to qualified ultimate borrowers.

children.label: A
children.text: required to complete a succession plan as a condition of the loan; and

children.label: B
children.text: be offered the opportunity to borrow sufficient funds to cover costs associated with the succession plan under subparagraph (A) and other associated legal and closing costs.

children.heading: Report
children.label: f Report
children.text: Not later than 1 year after , the Secretary shall submit to the Committee on Agriculture of the House of Representatives and the Committee on Agriculture, Nutrition, and Forestry of the Senate a report describing the operation and outcomes of the program under this section, with recommendations on how to strengthen the program.December 20, 2018

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: g Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this section $10,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2019 through 2023.
